body.title: SITUATE: check prior observe deposits before tier.2 call
body.result: feat: _situate_from_memory() + regex fix committed (43b4d0e4). Checks Igor memory for prior observe deposits before tier.2 call.
body.description: pe_situate slow path calls Ollama to identify files when required_files is empty. Igor already has FACTUAL memories from pe_store_observe_results deposits for prior ticket runs. Check memory_search for the ticket ID before burning a tier.2 call.
